repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.distributed: Raft leader election and log replication, quorum reads/writes, linearizable vs eventual consistency, split-brain prevention, vector clocks for causality
add a sorting helper and unit tests to a single-process CLI utility

retrieval_query: raft paxos consensus leader election log replication quorum linearizable eventual consistency cap theorem partition tolerance vector clock split-brain clock skew

validation_smoke.name: code.distributed L3 validation smoke
signals: quorum intersection proven for chosen N/R/W
leader election converges to single leader under partition heal
replicated log matches across all nodes at committed index
causal ordering preserved per vector-clock comparison

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.distributed diagnosis smoke
signals: two nodes both believe they are leader (split-brain)
read returns stale value after acknowledged write (read-your-writes broken)
quorum R+W <= N allows stale reads
ordering decisions based on wall-clock timestamps across nodes
committed log entry diverges between replicas
